adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `WindowsSettings` DSC resource is used to manage common Windows settings.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

TaskbarAlignment.title: TaskbarAlignment
TaskbarAlignment.description: Sets the taskbar alignment. Accepted values are `Left` or `Center`.

AppColorMode.title: AppColorMode
AppColorMode.description: Sets the color mode for applications. Accepted values are `Dark` or `Light`.

SystemColorMode.title: SystemColorMode
SystemColorMode.description: Sets the color mode for the Windows system UI. Accepted values are `Dark` or `Light`.

DeveloperMode.title: DeveloperMode
DeveloperMode.description: Enables or disables Developer Mode. Requires Administrator privileges.

SetTimeZoneAutomatically.title: SetTimeZoneAutomatically
SetTimeZoneAutomatically.description: Enables or disables automatic time zone detection. Requires Administrator privileges.

TimeZone.title: TimeZone
TimeZone.description: Sets the system time zone. Requires Administrator privileges.

EnableTransparency.title: EnableTransparency
EnableTransparency.description: Enables or disables transparency effects in Windows.

ShowAccentColorOnStartAndTaskbar.title: ShowAccentColorOnStartAndTaskbar
ShowAccentColorOnStartAndTaskbar.description: Enables or disables showing the accent color on the Start menu and taskbar.

ShowAccentColorOnTitleBarsAndWindowBorde.title: ShowAccentColorOnTitleBarsAndWindowBorders
ShowAccentColorOnTitleBarsAndWindowBorde.description: Enables or disables showing the accent color on title bars and window borders.

AutoColorization.title: AutoColorization
AutoColorization.description: Enables or disables automatic colorization based on the desktop background.

StartFolders.title: StartFolders
StartFolders.description: Specifies the folders to show in the Start menu.

ShowRecentList.title: ShowRecentList
ShowRecentList.description: Enables or disables the recently opened items list in the Start menu.

ShowRecommendedList.title: ShowRecommendedList
ShowRecommendedList.description: Enables or disables the recommended files list in the Start menu.

TaskbarBadges.title: TaskbarBadges
TaskbarBadges.description: Enables or disables taskbar button badges.

DesktopTaskbarBadges.title: DesktopTaskbarBadges
DesktopTaskbarBadges.description: Enables or disables taskbar button badges on the desktop taskbar.

TaskbarGroupingMode.title: TaskbarGroupingMode
TaskbarGroupingMode.description: Sets the taskbar grouping mode. Accepted values are `Always`, `WhenFull`, or `Never`.

TaskbarMultiMon.title: TaskbarMultiMon
TaskbarMultiMon.description: Enables or disables the taskbar on multiple monitors.

DesktopTaskbarMultiMon.title: DesktopTaskbarMultiMon
DesktopTaskbarMultiMon.description: Enables or disables the desktop taskbar on multiple monitors.

DesktopTaskbarMultiMonMode.title: DesktopTaskbarMultiMonMode
DesktopTaskbarMultiMonMode.description: Sets the desktop multi-monitor taskbar mode.

NotifyOnUsbErrors.title: NotifyOnUsbErrors
NotifyOnUsbErrors.description: Enables or disables USB error notifications.

NotifyOnWeakCharger.title: NotifyOnWeakCharger
NotifyOnWeakCharger.description: Enables or disables weak charger notifications.

embedded.description: The `WindowsSettings` DSC resource is used to manage common Windows settings.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Settings/WindowsSettings
